CVE-2022-29078.title: The ejs (aka Embedded JavaScript templates) package 3.1.6 for Nod ...
CVE-2022-29078.summary: The ejs (aka Embedded JavaScript templates) package 3.1.6 for Node.js allows server-side template injection in settings[view options][outputFunctionName]. This is parsed as an internal option, and overwrites the outputFunctionName option with an arbitrary OS command (which is executed upon template compilation).
